overview: A Spotify-inspired music app where users can browse songs, create playlists, view song lyrics, and enjoy a persistent mini player. Includes free and premium tiers — premium users unlock full lyrics, unlimited playlists, and an ad-free experience. Powered by Stripe for seamless upgrades.
features: Browse & search songs with album art, artist, and metadata
Global mini player with progress bar, skip, and volume controls
Create and manage private playlists (grid view)
Song lyrics display — teaser for free, full for premium
Premium account upgrade via Stripe checkout
Admin panel to add, edit, and delete songs
Internet Identity login and user accounts
6-8 pre-loaded demo songs with full metadata and lyrics
Responsive design for desktop and mobile
